docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, BOB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED APR-29-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, BOB
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCALAN VP OF TOWING. DEFENDANT BOB KAUFMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-27-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP OF TOWING. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
